title: woof project prerequisites
description: Project-side declaration at .woof/prerequisites.toml. Tells woof what infrastructure, public model CLIs, languages, and indexing tools the project depends on. The tool-side language registry (woof/languages/<lang>.toml) provides the install instructions per language. woof preflight verifies everything declared here. Two-tier caching: floor checks (binaries/versions/grammars/LSP plugins) cached 24h, hashed on this file plus referenced language registry tomls.

infra.description: Required infrastructure binaries. Keys are binary names (docker, just, git, gh, ...); values are version specifications. Floor checks verify presence and minimum version.

commands.description: Required public model CLIs used by woof dispatch. Woof must construct raw claude and codex invocations itself and must not require Ryan-local cld/cod wrappers or agent-sync.

validators.description: Required schema validators. ajv and ajv-formats are mandatory: woof validate uses ajv-cli for all internal artefact validation, and three schemas (gate, critique, jsonl-events) use the format keyword which ajv-cli only enforces when ajv-formats is loaded via -c ajv-formats. schemathesis is required only when contract decisions reference openapi documents.

repo.description: GitHub repository as <owner>/<name>. Verified via gh api at every /wf invocation.

grammars.description: Grammar names matching woof/languages/<name>.toml entries. Preflight parses each language's verify_snippet under verify_scope to confirm the grammar works.

languages.description: Languages requiring LSP. Preflight resolves each via woof/languages/<lang>.toml and verifies binary + plugin presence.

host.description: Project-specific host prerequisites that cannot be represented as simple versioned binaries. Preflight checks the current platform and runs declared commands from the project root.

platforms.description: Supported host platforms for this consumer checkout.

checks.description: Named project-specific host checks. Each command must exit 0 when the host is ready.

servers.description: Named local or project-specific server prerequisites. Each entry either runs a readiness command from the project root or probes a URL for the expected HTTP status.

version_spec.description: Version specification. 'any' = presence-only check. 'X', 'X.Y', 'X.Y.Z' = exact-floor (preflight accepts equal-or-greater). Trailing '+' is permitted as documentation; the floor semantics apply either way.

command.description: Command run from the project root. It must exit 0 when the prerequisite is satisfied.

required.description: Human-readable requirement shown in failed preflight output.

install.description: Command or concise instruction shown in failed preflight output.

command.description: Readiness command run from the project root. It must exit 0 when the server is ready.

url.description: HTTP URL to probe for readiness.

required.description: Human-readable requirement shown in failed preflight output.

install.description: Command or concise instruction shown in failed preflight output.
